content: Due to recent events the server is messier then ever. I would like to propose some more active community moderation/opening mod applications for the server.
To lessen the ammount of well... pure ragebait and people throwing kindling into argumentative fires

Could I please have the content creator tag? Id like to post in the morimens TV channel.

Right now Im posting content in the new player channel.

To go with Dom's point: I dm'ed the mods like you've asked with modmail, but no one responded. Maybe more mods will help you with a workload?
